inputs.label: Footing Length
inputs.businessContext: The length of a single footing in meters.

inputs.label: Footing Width
inputs.businessContext: The width of a single footing in meters.

inputs.label: Footing Depth
inputs.businessContext: The depth or thickness of the footing in meters.

inputs.label: Number of Footings
inputs.businessContext: Total number of identical footings to be poured.

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of extra concrete added to account for spillage, over‑excavation, and formwork irregularities.
